### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors')

## IActorStateMachine Interface

Checkpoints pipeline stages in actor state for crash\-recovery resume \(NFR25\)\.
All writes use SetStateAsync \(staging\)\. The caller commits atomically via SaveStateAsync\.

```csharp
public interface IActorStateMachine
```

&#8627; [ActorStateMachine](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.ActorStateMachine.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.ActorStateMachine')
